creator: josh@tcbug.org
text:
Thanks for the patch, but epic 0.3.7 has some pretty severe bugs in it that 
have been fixed in CVS.  The upstream maintainer wants to do a release in a 
week or so with the bugs fixed that can go in to ports.

For what it's worth I follow epic development fairly closely and talk to the 
upstream people on a daily basis.  If there's an epic releases that's not in 
ports there's generally a reason.

Please close this pr, I'll open a new one when the fixed release is made 
available (ETA 10-14 days)

The perl bits of the patch are noted and I'll test them and put them in the 
pr.

-- 
Thanks,

Josh Paetzel

PGP: 8A48 EF36 5E9F 4EDA 5A8C 11B4 26F9 01F1 27AF AECB
